internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {ι : Type u} {α : ι → Type v} (enumeration : Core.DependentEnumeration ι α) (p : (i : ι) → α i → Prop)
  (decideP : (index : ι) → (value : α index) → Decidable (p index value)),
  match Core.FiniteSearch.dependentSearch enumeration p decideP with
  | Core.FiniteSearch.DependentResult.found index value holds => p index value
  | Core.FiniteSearch.DependentResult.absent none => True
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.dependentSearch_sound

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {ι : Type u} {α : ι → Type v} (enumeration : Core.DependentEnumeration ι α) (p : (i : ι) → α i → Prop)
  (decideP : (index : ι) → (value : α index) → Decidable (p index value)),
  (∃ index value, p index value) →
    match Core.FiniteSearch.dependentSearch enumeration p decideP with
    | Core.FiniteSearch.DependentResult.found index value holds => True
    | Core.FiniteSearch.DependentResult.absent none => False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.dependentSearch_complete

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability
internalDeclarations.docString:
The complete problem-specific surface needed to execute CT1.

The capability contains only finite enumerators and a decision procedure for
the primitive realization relation. Search, exhaustiveness, certificates,
paths, and terminal selection are framework-derived.

Number of primitive realization decisions made by the exhaustive CT1
schedule when every finite fibre is inspected.  This counts only the local
tests supplied by the capability; it does not construct any ambient universe.

internalDeclarations.type:
{ι : Type u_1} →
  {α : ι → Type u_2} →
    (enumeration : Core.DependentEnumeration ι α) →
      (p : (i : ι) → α i → Prop) →
        (motive :
            StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.DependentListResult✝ enumeration.indices.orderedValues p →
              Sort u_3) →
          (x : StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.DependentListResult✝ enumeration.indices.orderedValues p) →
            ((index : ι) →
                (member : index ∈ enumeration.indices.orderedValues) →
                  (value : α index) →
                    (holds : p index value) →
                      motive
                        (StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.DependentListResult.found✝ index member value holds)) →
              ((absentProof : ∀ index ∈ enumeration.indices.orderedValues, ∀ (value : α index), ¬p index value) →
                  motive (StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.DependentListResult.absent✝ absentProof)) →
                motive x
